label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's take a look at this question. The passage is about Ann Makosinski, a 15-year-old student who invented a flashlight powered by body heat. The question is about the Hollow Flashlight and which statement is correct according to the passage. First, let me read the options again: (A) is safe, noiseless and energy-saving (B) was created by Ann and her friend (C) will come onto the market soon (D) works only at low temperatures Now, I need to check each option against the information in the passage. Starting with option A: "is safe, noiseless and energy-saving". The passage says, "They do not create any noise and will always work." Also, since it's powered by body heat and has no batteries or harmful chemicals, it's implied to be safe and energy-saving. So A seems correct. Option B: "was created by Ann and her friend". The passage mentions that she had a friend in the Philippines who had trouble studying due to lack of electricity, but the invention was done by Ann. No mention that her friend helped create it. So B is incorrect. Option C: "will come onto the market soon". The passage doesn't mention anything about the flashlight being sold or going to market. It's about her winning the contest and the features of the flashlight. So C is not supported. Option D: "works only at low temperatures". The passage says it
